title: PolyAPI Trigger
description: A trigger connects a cloud event source (such as a webhook) to a function for event-driven execution.

id.description: The unique identifier of the trigger.

sourceType.description: The type of event source (e.g., webhook, cloud event).

sourceId.description: The ID of the event source.

targetFunctionId.description: The ID of the function to trigger.

targetFunctionType.description: The type of function to trigger.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the trigger was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the trigger was last updated.
